description: Inside the safehouse, Coulson and Lincoln confront a holographic projection of Felix Blake, who berates Coulson for allying with Inhumans and manipulates Lincoln with a kill order. Lincoln follows Coulson’s instructions and attacks, discovering the ruse. The two agents realize the Watchdogs’ real plan went beyond the attack.

transcript.line: Blake? How are you here?
I'm everywhere, Coulson. As are you, apparently.
You recovered well.
Says the man who came back from the dead. I guess we both have a few tricks up our sleeve, old friend.
Aah!
Fitz! Fitz! What's that... what's the stuff called? Sodium what?
Sodium hydrogen acetate.
What?
I don't think it's working.
Maybe we slowed it down, but... must be the modifications that Blake made.
What does that mean?
That sooner or later, this bomb is gonna go off. And then I'll implode. Which is gonna be messy.
So here we are, reunited at last.
I got to admit, it's not what I'd hoped for.
I really thought it'd be ATCU proper who showed up at the compound. Didn't expect you.
I'm working with the ATCU.
You mean keeping S.H.I.E.L.D. alive within it. Those survival instincts of yours, Coulson, always impressive.
I searched for you. I wanted to make you part of the new S.H.I.E.L.D.
Yeah, well, when I got out of the hospital, it turned out there had never been a S.H.I.E.L.D., just Hydra hiding behind one. I signed up to protect the world from these dangerous alien elements.
We still do that.
The hell you do. You use them, unleash them. You've got those freaks working for you. Hell, Phil, you are one. Makes me sick.
We both know S.H.I.E.L.D. protects mankind.

And what has S.H.I.E.L.D. done in the name of protection? We brought the Chitauri to Earth. I was taken out by one of your cybernetic recruits. And the latest and greatest idea? The Avengers created Ultron.
What are you doing, Blake?
I'm trying to make the world a safer place...
No. What are you doing now? Here? I know your tactics. Speeches? Not one of them. You're stalling. Why?
